collections.name: iceK
collections.description: Proporciona bloques de valores constantes para Icestudio, permitiendo inyectar constantes numéricas y de bits fijas de distintos anchos en tus diseños digitales.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Provides constant-value blocks for Icestudio, letting you inject fixed numeric and bit constants of various widths into your digital designs.

collections.name: iceWires
collections.description: Bloques para trabajar con cables y buses en Icestudio, incluyendo separación y unión de bits y extensión de signo para enrutar y dar forma a las señales del diseño.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Blocks for working with wires and buses in Icestudio, including bit splitting, joining and sign extension to route and reshape signals across your design.

collections.name: iceIO
collections.description: Bloques para gestionar los pines de entrada/salida de la FPGA en Icestudio, conectando tu diseño a pines físicos como botones, LEDs y otros periféricos de la placa.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Blocks for managing FPGA input/output pins in Icestudio, connecting your design to physical pins such as buttons, LEDs and other board peripherals.

collections.name: iceGates
collections.description: Bloques de puertas lógicas combinacionales para Icestudio, que ofrecen las primitivas básicas AND, OR, NOT, XOR, NAND y NOR para construir circuitos digitales.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Combinational logic gate blocks for Icestudio, providing the basic AND, OR, NOT, XOR, NAND and NOR primitives to build digital circuits.

collections.name: iceMux
collections.description: Bloques de multiplexores y demultiplexores para Icestudio, que permiten seleccionar y enrutar una de varias entradas de datos o distribuir una señal a varias salidas.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Multiplexer and demultiplexer blocks for Icestudio, letting you select and route one of several data inputs or distribute a signal to multiple outputs.

collections.name: iceCoders
collections.description: Bloques de codificadores y decodificadores para Icestudio, que convierten entre códigos binarios y representaciones one-hot o de líneas en diseños digitales combinacionales.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Encoder and decoder blocks for Icestudio, converting between binary codes and one-hot or line representations for combinational digital designs.

collections.name: iceFF
collections.description: Bloques de biestables para Icestudio, que ofrecen los elementos básicos de almacenamiento secuencial como biestables D, T, JK y SR para construir lógica con estado.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Flip-flop blocks for Icestudio, providing the basic sequential storage elements such as D, T, JK and SR flip-flops for building stateful logic.

collections.name: iceRegs
collections.description: Bloques de registros para Icestudio, construidos a partir de biestables para almacenar y desplazar palabras de datos de varios bits en diseños secuenciales y de ruta de datos.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Register blocks for Icestudio, built from flip-flops to store and shift multi-bit data words for sequential and data-path digital designs.

collections.name: iceSRegs
collections.description: Proporciona bloques de registros de desplazamiento en varios anchos de bits para el manejo de datos serie-paralelo y paralelo-serie en diseños de Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Provides shift register blocks in several bit widths for serial-to-parallel and parallel-to-serial data handling in Icestudio designs.

collections.name: iceBoards
collections.description: Colección de bloques y diseños de ejemplo adaptados a las distintas placas FPGA soportadas, que ayudan a empezar rápidamente con el hardware concreto.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Collection of blocks and example designs tailored to the different supported FPGA boards, helping users get started quickly on their specific hardware.

collections.name: iceComp
collections.description: Colección de Icestudio con bloques comparadores para comparar valores digitales, generando resultados de igualdad y magnitud en diseños FPGA.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Icestudio collection of comparator blocks for comparing digital values, producing equality and magnitude results in FPGA designs.

collections.name: iceArith
collections.description: Bloques de aritmética entera, como sumadores, para construir lógica de cálculo y operaciones de ruta de datos en diseños FPGA de Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Integer arithmetic blocks such as adders for building computational logic and data-path operations in Icestudio FPGA designs.

collections.name: iceCounter
collections.description: Colección de bloques contadores en múltiples anchos de bits, con variantes ascendente, ascendente/descendente, módulo y reset para lógica secuencial en Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Collection of counter blocks in multiple bit widths, including up, up/down, modulo and reset variants for sequential logic in Icestudio.

collections.name: iceSignals
collections.description: Bloques para la gestión y generación de señales de 1 bit, incluyendo tics y pulsos, para lógica de temporización y control en diseños de Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Blocks for the management and generation of 1-bit signals, including tics and pulses, for timing and control logic in Icestudio designs.

collections.name: icePLL
collections.description: Bloques para trabajar con PLLs (bucles de enganche de fase) para sintetizar y ajustar frecuencias de reloj en diseños FPGA de Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Blocks for working with PLLs (phase-locked loops) to synthesize and adjust clock frequencies in Icestudio FPGA designs.

collections.name: iceLedoscope
collections.description: Un analizador lógico que visualiza señales digitales directamente en los LEDs de la placa, permitiendo observar y medir la actividad de las señales sin instrumentos externos.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: A logic analyzer that visualizes digital signals directly on the board's LEDs, letting you observe and measure signal activity without external instruments.

collections.name: iceLeds
collections.description: Bloques para controlar y mostrar información en LEDs, con componentes listos para encender LEDs individuales y matrices de LEDs en tus diseños FPGA de Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Blocks for driving and displaying information on LEDs, providing ready-to-use components for lighting up single LEDs and LED arrays in your Icestudio FPGA designs.

collections.name: iceHeart
collections.description: Generadores de señales de temporización (corazones) que producen pulsos periódicos y latidos de reloj, útiles para activar lógica secuencial y marcar el ritmo de eventos en tus circuitos FPGA.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Timing signal generators (hearts) that produce periodic pulses and clock beats, useful for driving sequential logic and pacing events in your FPGA circuits.

collections.name: iceInputs
collections.description: Bloques de entrada de 1 bit que incluyen pulsadores e interruptores, con componentes listos para llevar entradas físicas del usuario a tus diseños FPGA de Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: 1-bit input blocks including pushbuttons and switches, giving ready-made components to bring physical user inputs into your Icestudio FPGA designs.

collections.name: iceRok
collections.description: Bloques de sonda de analizador lógico que permiten depurar señales dentro de tu diseño FPGA sin hardware externo, integrándose con sigrok y la interfaz PulseView para capturar y disparar sobre señales de bus.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Logic-analyzer probe blocks that let you debug signals inside your FPGA design without external hardware, integrating with sigrok and the PulseView GUI to capture and trigger on bus signals.

collections.name: iceMachines
collections.description: Bloques de máquinas de estados simples con una interfaz estándar, que aportan componentes secuenciales reutilizables para diseñar lógica de control y comportamiento basado en estados en Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Simple state machine blocks with a standard interface, providing reusable sequential building blocks for designing control logic and state-driven behavior in Icestudio.

collections.name: iceSerial
collections.description: Bloques para comunicaciones serie asíncronas (UART), que permiten transmitir y recibir datos serie entre tu diseño FPGA y dispositivos externos.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Blocks for asynchronous serial communication (UART), enabling transmit and receive of serial data between your FPGA design and external devices.

collections.name: iceMem
collections.description: Una biblioteca de bloques de memoria para trabajar con memorias en tus diseños FPGA, con componentes listos para almacenar y recuperar datos.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: A library of memory blocks for working with memories in your FPGA designs, providing ready-to-use components for storing and retrieving data.

collections.name: iceMeasure
collections.description: Bloques para medir fácilmente ciclos y tiempo en tus circuitos, que permiten contar ciclos de reloj y tiempo transcurrido para caracterizar y verificar tus diseños FPGA.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Blocks for easily measuring cycles and time in your circuits, letting you count clock cycles and elapsed time to characterize and verify your FPGA designs.

collections.name: iceStack
collections.description: Bloques de Icestudio para construir y trabajar con pilas hardware, ofreciendo estructuras de almacenamiento LIFO de tipo push/pop que puedes integrar en tus diseños FPGA.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Icestudio blocks for building and working with hardware stacks, providing push/pop LIFO storage structures you can wire into your FPGA designs.

collections.name: iceFlash
collections.description: Bloques para leer de memorias flash serie SPI, con controladores de lectura de 8/16/32 bits, una interfaz de bus SPI y utilidades de escritura de bytes para diseños FPGA.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Blocks to read from SPI serial flash memories, including 8/16/32-bit flash-read controllers, an SPI bus interface, and byte-write helpers for FPGA designs.

collections.name: iceBus
collections.description: Bloques para acceder y compartir buses sencillos, con componentes de acceso unidireccional y bidireccional para un amplio rango de anchos de bus (de 1 a 32 bits).
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Blocks for accessing and sharing simple buses, with unidirectional and bidirectional bus access components across a wide range of bit widths (1 to 32 bits).

collections.name: iceLCD
collections.description: Componentes y controladores para LCDs de caracteres, con controladores de 4 y 8 bits, piezas de unión/separación de bus y ciclos de temporización para gobernar pantallas tipo HD44780.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Components and controllers for character LCDs, providing 4-bit and 8-bit controllers, bus join/split parts, and timing cycles to drive HD44780-style displays.

collections.name: iceCrystal
collections.description: Colección de bloques para gobernar pantallas gráficas desde FPGAs de código abierto, con controladores LCD HD44780/KS0068B, drivers, compositores, streamers y traductores de número a ASCII/vúmetro.
collections.author: cavearr

en.description: Block collection to drive graphic displays from open-source FPGAs, with HD44780/KS0068B LCD controllers, drivers, compositors, streamers, and number-to-ASCII/vumeter translators.

collections.name: ice-chips-verilog
collections.description: Biblioteca de todos los dispositivos de lógica discreta comunes en Verilog, que recrea los chips TTL de la serie 7400 (74LS/74HC/74HCT): puertas, multiplexores, contadores, registros, sumadores y multiplicadores, validados con banco de pruebas.
collections.author: TimRudy

en.description: A library of all common discrete logic devices in Verilog, recreating the 74LS/74HC/74HCT 7400-series TTL chips: gates, multiplexers, counters, registers, adders and multipliers, fully test-bench validated.

collections.name: ArithmeticBlocks
collections.description: Bloques aritméticos de enteros con y sin signo para FPGA (8/16/24/32/48 bits): suma, resta, multiplicación, división, raíz cuadrada, valor absoluto, negación, mínimo, máximo, comparación y selección.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: FPGA signed and unsigned integer arithmetic blocks (8/16/24/32/48-bit): add, subtract, multiply, divide, square root, absolute value, negate, min, max, compare and select.

collections.name: iceSynth
collections.description: Bloques para síntesis de audio en FPGAs, con DACs PDM, generadores de tono (pulso, sierra, triángulo, ruido) y utilidades de canal/reloj para generar sonido.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Blocks for audio synthesis on FPGAs, including PDM DACs, tone generators (pulse, saw, triangle, noise) and channel/clock utilities for making sound.

collections.name: icebreaker
collections.description: Bloques listos para usar y ejemplos prácticos para la placa FPGA abierta iCEBreaker, que facilitan empezar con sus periféricos y su asignación de pines en Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Ready-to-use blocks and worked examples for the iCEBreaker open FPGA board, helping you get started with its peripherals and pinout in Icestudio.

collections.name: Jedi
collections.description: Colección de bloques didácticos creados en la academia de hardware FPGA Jedi, útiles para aprender diseño digital paso a paso en Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Collection of teaching blocks created at the FPGA Jedi hardware academy, useful for learning digital design step by step in Icestudio.

collections.name: LOVE-FPGA
collections.description: Biblioteca de componentes hardware virtuales y ejemplos para el proyecto LOVE-FPGA, que conecta electrónica simulada con FPGAs dentro de Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Library of virtual hardware components and examples for the LOVE-FPGA project, linking simulated electronics to FPGAs within Icestudio.

collections.name: Stdio
collections.description: Bloques de entrada-salida estándar para comunicarse con distintos dispositivos, incluida la comunicación serie, en diseños de Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Standard input-output blocks for interfacing with different devices, including serial communication, in Icestudio designs.

collections.name: CT11
collections.description: Ejemplos del cuaderno técnico 11 sobre señales del sistema y medición con el LEDoscopio, un recurso práctico de aprendizaje de FPGA para Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Examples from technical notebook 11 covering system signals and measurement with the LEDoscope, a hands-on FPGA learning resource for Icestudio.

collections.name: Generic
collections.description: Colección genérica de bloques de propósito general para Icestudio, que aporta elementos de construcción comunes no ligados a una placa o dispositivo concreto.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Generic collection of general-purpose blocks for Icestudio, providing common building elements not tied to a specific board or device.

collections.name: Logic
collections.description: Puertas lógicas junto con bloques combinacionales y secuenciales para diseñar circuitos digitales en Icestudio.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Logic gates plus combinational and sequential building blocks for designing digital circuits in Icestudio.

collections.name: iceK-TB
collections.description: Colección de tests que verifica los bloques de iceK.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Test bench collection that verifies the blocks of iceK.

collections.name: iceWires-TB
collections.description: Colección de tests que verifica los bloques de iceWires.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Test bench collection that verifies the blocks of iceWires.

collections.name: iceIO-TB
collections.description: Colección de tests que verifica los bloques de iceIO.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Test bench collection that verifies the blocks of iceIO.

collections.name: iceGates-TB
collections.description: Colección de tests que verifica los bloques de iceGates.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Test bench collection that verifies the blocks of iceGates.

collections.name: iceCoders-TB
collections.description: Colección de tests que verifica los bloques de iceCoders.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Test bench collection that verifies the blocks of iceCoders.

collections.name: iceFF-TB
collections.description: Colección de tests que verifica los bloques de iceFF.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Test bench collection that verifies the blocks of iceFF.

collections.name: iceRegs-TB
collections.description: Colección de tests que verifica los bloques de iceRegs.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Test bench collection that verifies the blocks of iceRegs.

collections.name: iceSRegs-TB
collections.description: Colección de tests que verifica los bloques de iceSRegs.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Test bench collection that verifies the blocks of iceSRegs.

collections.name: Jedi-Test
collections.description: Colección de tests que verifica los bloques de la colección Jedi.
collections.author: FPGAwars

en.description: Test bench collection that verifies the blocks of the Jedi collection.
